members.name: CMP Model
members.description: Epidemiology model output for Turkana, Kenya.

info.name: Description
info.content: Conway-Maxwell Poisson model July 2025 future predictions using the following variables: Sex, gender, age, minimum temperature, soil type, forest height, population density, LULC, greenness, wetness, brightness, distance to water bodies and NDVI.

members.name: GAM Model
members.description: Epidemiology model output for Turkana, Kenya.

info.name: Description
info.content: Generalized Additive Model February 2025 future predictions using the following variables: Sex, gender, age, minimum temperature, soil type, forest height, population density, LULC, greenness, wetness, brightness, distance to water bodies and NDVI.

members.name: GPR Model
members.description: Epidemiology model output for Turkana, Kenya.

info.name: Description
info.content: Generalized Poisson Regression model January 2025 future predictions using the following variables: Sex, gender, age, minimum temperature, soil type, forest height, population density, LULC, greenness, wetness, brightness, distance to water bodies and NDVI.

info.name: Metadata/Publication
info.content: For more information, see the publication: [https://doi.org/10.3389/fdgth.2025.1643314](https://doi.org/10.3389/fdgth.2025.1643314)
